topic: A beauty clinic owner told me her biggest problem was not getting clients. It was keeping them.

slides.title: Getting clients was easy. Keeping them was not.
Her treatments were excellent. Her reviews were strong.
slides.body: Clients left happy. But 40% of them never came back.

slides.title: Not because they had a bad experience.
slides.body: Because nobody followed up. No rebooking reminder. No aftercare message. No nudge. Nothing.

slides.title: They got busy and forgot.
slides.body: Three months later they saw another clinic on Instagram and booked there instead.

slides.title: We built a system that fixes this.
slides.body: A follow-up message 3 days after every treatment. Then a rebooking reminder timed to the treatment cycle. Preferred therapist and treatment pre-selected.

slides.title: They rebook in two taps.
slides.body: Her repeat booking rate doubled in the first 60 days.

slides.title: The clients were never lost.
slides.body: They were just never asked to come back.

slides.title: If your rebooking rate is lower than it should be, send me a message.
slides.body: I will show you what the fix looks like.
